FAST_TICK_MS.name: fast-tick-ms
FAST_TICK_MS.comment: Tick rate while source conversion or source cleanup is still active.

IDLE_TICK_MS.name: idle-tick-ms
IDLE_TICK_MS.comment: Tick rate once the Archimedes source network is stable.

MAX_BLOCKS_PER_STEP.name: max-blocks-per-step
MAX_BLOCKS_PER_STEP.comment: Archimedes sources removed per fast tick when draining (farthest from the screw first). Use 1 for one source every fastTickMs.

MAX_SCREW_LENGTH.name: max-screw-length
MAX_SCREW_LENGTH.comment: Safety cap for how many screw blocks are scanned upward to locate the outlet.

MAX_VANILLA_CONVERSION_PASSES.name: max-vanilla-conversion-passes
MAX_VANILLA_CONVERSION_PASSES.comment: Per tick, how many times to expand vanilla bucket sources into managed water along a chain (fast placement needs more).

MINIMUM_NETWORK_SPEED.name: minimum-network-speed
MINIMUM_NETWORK_SPEED.comment: Mechanical network speed below this value counts as unpowered.
